mlb.label: MLB
mlb.note: Live MLB board from the validated model pipeline. Click a game for the full tracked slate.

launches.title: Live API
launches.copy: This board is now fed by the live MLB pipeline instead of sample bootstrap data.

launches.title: Game clustering
launches.copy: Each matchup keeps a compressed top layer plus a deeper slate behind the click.

launches.title: Recent form
launches.copy: Hit-rate columns use live MLB recent-form fields, including L3 when available.

notes: If no lineups are confirmed yet, the board will stay sparse instead of inventing plays.
Scores stay on the 0-50 scale from the tuned board logic.
